economic_notes: KRW Limited Partnership established to develop real property on Brandon Lands, shared with Keeseekoowenin and Waywayseecappo First Nations - no development activity in current year. Southquill Gaming Centre, Restaurant, and Gas Bar operated as business enterprises. VLT revenue significantly reduced from $6,077,598 to $2,337,215 likely due to COVID-19 closures.
notes: Fiscal year is 2021 not 2024. Consolidated entity includes Band Operations, Housing, Post-Secondary, Social Assistance, Southquill Health Services, Southquill Gaming Centre & Restaurant, and Southquill Gas Bar. KRW Limited Partnership accounted for on modified equity basis as a GBE. VLT revenue dropped dramatically ($6.1M to $2.3M) likely due to COVID-19 pandemic closures. No schedule of remuneration provided. Annual debt service calculated as repayment of long term debt ($135,686) plus repayment of capital lease obligations ($43,441) = $179,127. Total government transfers includes ISC ($11,343,607) + CMHC ($67,726) + First Peoples Development Inc ($159,993) + Province of Manitoba ($182,894) + Government of Canada other ($21,174) - totalling $11,775,394 less deferred adjustments; segment federal total of $11,571,326 plus provincial $182,894 used as basis. Construction in progress of $9,335 commenced for 2-unit CMHC housing project.
